title: The Scheming Women
writer: Jacques Robert, Henri Decoin, François Boyer
actors: Raymond Rouleau, Jeanne Moreau, Raymond Pellegrin
plot: Paul Rémi, the well-known theater director, was accused by his secretary, Andrieux, of having pushed his associate Bazine from a footbridge situated twelve meters above the stage. Advised by his wife Mona, he hides in a psychiatri...
